HARIDWAR RISHIKESH PILGRIMAGE

Spiritual journey to the holy cities of Haridwar and Rishikesh.

Main Tour Image

Haridwar & Rishikesh

Ganga Aarti

Temples

Tour Information

Duration

3-4 Days

Distance Covered

Approx. 700 km (Delhi-Haridwar-Rishikesh-Delhi)

Starting Price

₹12,000

Highlights

  • Ganga Aarti at Har Ki Pauri
  • Mansa Devi Temple
  • Chandi Devi Temple
  • Laxman Jhula
  • Ram Jhula
  • Yoga & Meditation
